summary:
PRESIDENTIAL DECISIONS AND DOMESTIC THREATS: Brandon recounts visions concerning Trump being in a critical valley of decision comparable to Roosevelt's choices during World War II, warning of an upcoming escalation of war. Brandon details an impending political storm in 2026 where opponents will continuously push for impeachment. He mentions the presence of infiltrators or rats within the White House, the Pentagon, and Homeland Security who have remained through previous administrations. Furthermore, Brandon describes visions of targeted attacks against Trump's family, specifically mentioning an eye for an eye scenario, and severe danger threatening Don Jr., who appeared to fade away like a ghost in a vision, as well as his daughter Kai. He also claims the CIA possesses a yellow and black hypnotic coil intended for broadcast across the nation.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND GEOPOLITICAL PLOTS: Brandon outlines a secret meeting between Kim Jong-un, Vladimir Putin, Xi Jinping, and Ayatollah Khamenei. In this vision, Kim Jong-un, surrounded by young women, uses a secure landline to conspire against the United States due to anger over events in Venezuela. Brandon describes Xi Jinping securing military support to invade Taiwan, predicting a rapid takeover by special operations forces utilizing helicopters, taking advantage of a strategy to stretch the United States military too thin across multiple global conflicts. He warns of a synchronized, nighttime biological attack against Israel involving Turkey, Syria, Egypt, and the Muslim Brotherhood, utilizing 50-gallon drums of yellow liquid. Additionally, Brandon foresees a targeted assassination attempt against Ukrainian President Zelensky, leading to the installation of a new proxy government, alongside an ongoing strategy by foreign adversaries to overwhelm American defenses.

CARIBBEAN THREATS AND UNDERGROUND INFRASTRUCTURE: Brandon highlights a severe, impending storm originating from Cuba, which he identifies as a more significant threat than Venezuela. He details a three-stranded alliance involving Mexican drug cartels, Claudia Scheinbaum and Cuban leaders deeply involved in illicit trafficking. Brandon describes secret nocturnal deliveries to Cuba via submarines and the construction of underground caverns and military bases housing biological weapons. He recounts a vision of a lavender dragon rising from the water and biological agents contained in glass cylinder tubes marked with a specific symbol aimed at Miami and the Florida Keys. Conversely, he also predicts a future liberation and economic revival for Cuba, symbolized by a green blade of growth and underwater communication cords connecting to Europe and Russia.

DOMESTIC INFILTRATION AND INSTITUTIONAL CORRUPTION: Brandon warns of foreign infiltration within the United States borders, comparing it to a Red Dawn scenario involving secret Chinese operatives and Middle Eastern agents. He shifts his focus to profound financial and political corruption across various states, describing visions of baby cobras representing corruption in Minnesota, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Boston. He specifically names political figures such as John Fetterman and Gavin Newsom in relation to these corrupt activities. Brandon details a massive money-laundering operation involving red arrows directing funds from Washington to a central vault in Ukraine, which are then distributed to multiple individuals, referencing 24 billion dollars in wire transfers. He anticipates the emergence of a whistleblower comparable to Edward Snowden who will expose decades of profound sexual perversion and financial fraud hidden in file cabinets, overshadowing previous scandals involving Jeffrey Epstein. Furthermore, he foresees two Supreme Court justices stepping down due to extreme embarrassment and corruption, specifically noting Chief Justice Roberts in his visions.

FUTURE PLAGUES AND ENVIRONMENTAL DISASTERS: Brandon shares explicit visions regarding biological and environmental crises scheduled to escalate between 2026 and 2028. He describes a manufactured plague combining artificial intelligence and the bubonic plague, spread by rats with red eyes, for which there will be no actual vaccine. He attributes these coming crises to a Rockefeller agenda aimed at manipulating the food supply through diseases targeting cattle and promoting insect-based alternatives to lower testosterone levels and pacify the population. Geographically, Brandon predicts a massive volcanic eruption in the Pacific Ocean near the Oregon coast, which will trigger a devastating tsunami reaching Seattle. He also foresees a severe earthquake in British Columbia causing significant casualties, and he identifies the unusual phenomenon of deep-sea fish and whales washing ashore as the primary harbinger of these impending coastal cataclysms.

TARGETED ATTACKS ON RELIGIOUS INSTITUTIONS: Brandon issues urgent warnings concerning specific churches and religious leaders facing imminent danger. He mentions Lakewood Church and Joel and Victoria Osteen, foreseeing a necessary shaking and awakening. More specifically, Brandon describes a targeted threat against John Hagee and Cornerstone Church in San Antonio due to their staunch support for Israel. He details an ongoing plot by an ISIS sympathizer, described as a heavy-set, lighter-skinned African-American man, planning to attack the congregation, while asserting that spiritual authority can neutralize these violent assignments.

TECHNOLOGICAL CENSORSHIP AND ECONOMIC SHIFTS: Brandon predicts an upcoming period of intense censorship and legal warfare surrounding social media platforms between 2026 and 2028. He foresees massive lawsuits originating from the European Union aimed at Elon Musk and the platform X, attempting to stifle First Amendment rights under the guise of fact-checking. This orchestrated pressure could culminate in a Watergate-level scandal designed to interfere with the 2028 elections. Economically, Brandon speaks of a supernatural wealth transfer and the rise of a new digital gold, alongside significant financial shifts involving BRICS nations and attempts by international leaders like Emmanuel Macron to disrupt traditional financial flows.
rawData: [January 06, 2026]-[Praying for America]-[https://youtu.be/TLV_rmXYyO8]-[Good evening, family. Thank you for joining me today. I appreciate it. We've got a lot to pray about tonight. I don't even know where to jump into this river right now; I'm just worshiping and listening. Some of the things the Lord has shown me today concern the storm and praying over our nation. I was hearing, "Brandon Biggs loves America." My family and I love America. We love President Trump. We love our nation and we pray for it every single day. But there's a storm coming, and I never want to come across as cynical toward America—that I'm up here damning America and saying, "Well, Brandon, you're against America." No, I love America. I love my country. I pray for it every single day. We were talking about it today: we pray for President Trump more than we pray for anybody else. But when you see storms and things coming, I am a watchman and I tell you what I see. So, I never want to come across as being cynical or against America. We love America. I just want you to know that when I say what I say, we love President Trump. But I'm going to tell you, we need to pray for him. Tonight's video is dedicated to praying for our country, for President Trump, and for the valley of decision where he is right now and the storm that is on both sides. He's walking through a valley with cliffs on both sides, and I saw him about to make a major decision. This decision is probably one of the most important decisions made by any president in decades, probably since World War II. It's that big of a decision—like the deciding factor for Roosevelt to join in when Japan bombed Pearl Harbor. We are at a crossroads right now in America, and what we're about to see is an escalation of war like you wouldn't believe. We're at a tipping point and most people don't realize the severity and the urgency of it. Maybe you feel the urgency tonight because you clicked on this video so quickly. But this is a time like we've never seen before. In this generation, our grandfathers fought in the war. How many times have I told you I've seen scenes like Saving Private Ryan over Europe and other areas? I saw the Hitler symbol being called up through sacrifice, through virgin sacrifices out of Berlin through witchcraft. I saw so much demonic, occultic activity—channeling and trying to conjure up through CERN, through portals, through satanic practice—trying to bring forth the Hitler spirit to bring forth the Mahdi, which would be the Antichrist. I don't focus on darkness and I really never talk about it, but I tell you what I see when I see it. Like I said, we're at the Valley of Decision, and so I'm going to go over some of the things the Lord has shown me concerning Cuba and the storm coming out of Cuba. I've warned about Cuba more than I warned about Venezuela. Cuba was a hot spot; Cuba's more serious than Venezuela. We went after Venezuela and we took Maduro out and that's all done, right? No, it's not done. There's more coming. There's a storm. The drug cartels don't want to let go; they've had a stronghold over that nation. This is big money—billions of dollars of drug and human trafficking. They've had a stronghold on that nation. There are key leaders and people through Cuba that are very dark and it goes into Claudia; it's a three-stranded cord that is not easily broken—a three-stranded cord that goes through Mexico, through Claudia and the drug cartels, and through Cuba. It's like a V. What the Lord has warned us so many times is that I saw submarines and boats secretly delivering packages to Cuba in the night. What is secret to us is secret to the United States. Being 100 miles away from the southernmost point, I'm sure they know. They know everything about us; to pretend they don't is ignorance. But I've seen a storm coming out of Cuba and the Lord kept bringing up the 1960s Cuban Missile Crisis, revisiting old alliances with Russia and Cuba, and the things that I've seen in the days ahead—secret things. I saw underground caverns that were dug in Cuba, underground bases that had military equipment and biological weapons so they could infiltrate and go after Miami and parts of the Florida Keys. How do you attack and retaliate? I saw the dragon come up three times out of the water. It was lavender. If anybody remembers the dragon, it had purple under its eyes. It was symbolic of something the Lord was trying to tell us about. The dragon came up out of the water three times, dipping three times. It was symbolic of something we're praying over. The Lord showed me something biological. The Lord said, "Watch for the mules," and I saw people moving in the cover of night that had a black drum with a symbol on the side. Then a biological thing that looked like one of those bank teller tubes, which represented something else. I saw a cylinder tube that was glass that had a symbol on the side of it. The Lord showed me that coming out of Cuba, hitting the Miami side. This symbol I saw on the side of it was very serious. We see these things and I saw liberation coming. Remember, I saw a green blade coming up out of Cuba. Not adding to or taking away from anything, but I saw a brand new future coming for them. I saw liberation coming for Cuba; I saw green coming up out of Cuba. That was a spring of growth. There were cords attached underwater that looked like internet cords that were going toward the Europe and Russia area, and it was attached to a new spring of growth of finances, liberty, and freedom for Cubans. I saw revival coming to Brazil, Venezuela, Cuba, Mexico, and all of South America. It was a major revival. He just kept talking and says it over and over: "Watch Cuba. They're in your backyard." That's what has been on my heart today. In this Valley of Decision, it concerns Cuba. It's from the persecution. Remember I warned you what the Holy Spirit told us: 2026 would be a year of a lot of political theater and it would escalate until the summer. In the days ahead, you will hear "impeach, impeach, impeach." They'll say it a lot. They'll try to remove him. But here the Lord warned us about the rats. I don't ever call an individual a rat, but there are rats in the White House, the Pentagon, and Homeland Security. I pray that President Trump finds every rat and they are exposed. I saw strategic people that were rats in our military, rats that have infiltrated through the Biden administration and other administrations before Obama and are still here. So we warn, I pray over these things. Remember the CIA had a yellow hypnotic coil, and in the days ahead they're going to run that hypnotic coil. It is yellow and black, which represents something serious, and it broadcasts across America. Now I'm not into conspiracies; I don't get into all the weirdness. I just tell you what I see in visions and what the Lord warns me about to pray for our country. And we must pray for President Trump's safety. When I was in the spirit last night, I saw again attacks upon his family. I saw an eye for an eye concerning Melania. And the Lord said, "Do not forget to pray for Don Jr. again." For I saw him like it was in Back to the Future when Michael J. Fox was standing on the stage and he had the pictures of his brothers and sisters and they were fading out. Remember, because he had to get his mom and dad together in the movie. That's the way Don Jr. looked tonight. He started to fade; he looked like a ghost. You could see through him. And the Lord said, "Bring him back in the front." And as we pray for him, I saw him become bold in color and his skin filled out again. He was fading away like a ghost. And the Lord said, "Pray for him." And I saw his feet and his legs become solid again. Now, I know that's symbolic, and I'm not here to cause drama and cause fear, but I'm telling you what the Lord has told me to pray for Don Jr., for his life is in danger. Pray for his daughter Kai. I don't know why they would choose to pick a young woman. I don't understand why I see her face before me, but the Lord said, "Pray for Don Jr. and pray for Kai." So, I would encourage all 5,200 of you to take this very seriously and pray for this man. For they said, "An eye for an eye." I hear it; I go into their meetings. The Lord allows me to do this stuff. I don't know how; it's just by the Spirit of God. But I pray for this man's life. I saw great grievance again coming upon our president for losing his son. And he was broken. He's just as human as all of us are. He's a tough old bird that has a backbone like a crowbar and makes hard decisions when nobody else has the rocks to do it. So I pray for him. I pray for his family because the Lord said you'll be so thankful that you have him in the days ahead. There's a storm coming to our nation because of the Biden administration and what they let in our nation over the last four years before President Trump's term. And in the days ahead, the Democrats will look really stupid, even more so than they already do. And the liberalness with which they are trying to destroy our nation is because they wanted to bring it down. They have to bring it down; it's in the way. But thank God for President Trump and thank God for our people who fight for our nation—our men and women of service and our law enforcement of Homeland Security, FBI, CIA—the ones that are good for what I see. And I strictly say the ones that are good. And I pray for every single one of us that we are protected in the days ahead. I saw again last night Kim Jong-un talking on the phone in a private meeting with Putin, with Xi Jinping, and it was a conversation even with Ayatollah Khamenei. They were all talking and they were furious about Venezuela. They were furious about how this would all take place and they were devising a plan of how to infiltrate each piece of land that they wanted. Kim Jong-un was offered a lot. I could hear them talking. It was on a landline; it wasn't a cell phone. It was a secret landline so nobody could tap it. He was wearing black silk clothes; he had gold embroidery around it. He had women all around him. I saw women feeding him and bringing him drinks. I saw servants of women that looked like prostitutes all around Kim Jong-un. They were young girls, probably in their 20s, but there were lots of them. I would say probably 10 to 20 because they were coming in and out of a room and they were bringing things and they were fanning him. He was sitting back in what looked like a lounge couch, and he had his hand up and he was talking on the phone and communicating. He acted like he was some kind of pimp or something. I don't know how else to describe it. And he was talking and I saw them devising a plan against our great country. They were upset because of Venezuela. But I saw them. I saw Xi Jinping trying to get the votes across in his own country that he needed more votes. There were people that were standing against invading Taiwan, but he had three votes of three men that looked like generals. They were in army fatigues and had a lot of badges on their chests. They were in favor of taking Taiwan. But he had a group of people that were not in favor because they didn't want retaliation from the United States for their economy and what they thought would be retaliation for their actions. They were scared because Donald Trump is strong. If it was anybody else, it would already be done. I'm telling you, they are afraid of strong leadership. And that's what I saw, that they were weighing out the balance if it was worth the risk to take Taiwan. I saw in the vision they took Taiwan in two or three days to totally take it. They surrendered. It didn't take much. Just like Venezuela, they went in; they took out the leadership. I saw them go in with their special ops. They came in on helicopters. I watched it all in the vision. I saw how they did it. They landed and they took everybody out. Now, they didn't escape with no injuries; there were casualties. I saw people laying all over the ground. They were fighting back. But it didn't take much because they did basically the same strategic plan that we did on Venezuela. It was like that. They're too powerful. I saw that happening and as I saw this happening, I saw a plan against Israel to strike Israel. This was more strategic; it happened at night. Turkey and Syria were all involved. The Brotherhood—I saw biological weapons used during this attack that were in 50-gallon drums that looked like yellow liquid. I saw it again, but not this time. It just wasn't on that side, which would be the east, right? No, yeah, east. It was Egypt, and I saw it coming out of Egypt also. It was surrounded on all sides. Then I saw again a Jason Bourne kind of an attack against the coke snorter, Zelensky. I saw him being taken out and I saw a proxy government being put in that was pro-Ukraine and pro-Russia. I saw an escalation. I heard them say, "We can stretch him too thin that he can't retaliate against all of it at once. We can stretch him too thin that we can do it if we all be strategic. We can stretch him too thin that he can't protect everybody at once. He'll have to choose who he wants to help. It'll be too much because he already has his hand in Venezuela and Cuba." Do you understand? So we can stretch him too thin. And I heard him say, and I saw like a rubber band that looked like it was ready to break. It was stretched in the vision. It was stretched. And I saw a plan to try to escalate war. But this is the thing: they infiltrated us within. Stretch too thin for the enemy within. Stretch too thin for the enemy. The enemy within is what I heard. A Red Dawn experience, D-Day. And there was an enemy within. But the Lord said, "I want to show you something." And as I looked across, there were Chinese troops in our country. And people were just focused on the Muslim-Arab people, the Middle Easterners. But there was infiltration also of Chinese secret spies in our country that had been let in through the border. And it wasn't just one country who has infiltrated us, but we have more than one. And there were Chinese secret ops in our country. It wasn't as much as the Arabs, but they were still here. And so I see these things, and the Lord allows me to warn you to pray for our nation, to pray for our president, because he has a lot of hard decisions to make in the days ahead. We still have to pray over the elections coming up in 2026. But the country will look a lot different by then. This is 250 years of our beautiful country. And so I believe that we'll have revival. I believe we're going to see a lot of things. But when I told you, there it is. It's like a quarter. It's that thin. It's rice paper thin. The dark's going to get darker on this side and the light's going to get lighter on this side. And 2026 will mark a year like you've never seen before. And from 2026, 2027, and 2028 will be an acceleration of things. The Lord brought me back. Thank you. There He is. He said, "Tell them again about the rat." I saw Elon Musk coming back on the scene being a friend, remember? And I said he will use social media and there will be the potential for a Watergate scandal in 2028. A Watergate scandal will try to break forth in 2028 that will try to derail the presidency of 2028. It will be because of social media and things will be asked. We can pray this away and maybe we just exposed it right now so it won't happen. But I saw the opportunity for a Watergate scenario using social media because of great pressure from the EU, from Europe. All of them coming against Elon Musk and X. There'll be major lawsuits that will come against Elon Musk in the days ahead for mega money to sue him regarding First Amendment rights and for shutting down the freedom of speech in their nations using his platform. And they will try to attack him. And I saw great censorship coming through 2026 all the way through 2028 for fact-checkers and all kinds of things. They're going to try to make it where you can't say things. "Oh, this is false information." You know how they always do, like what they did with COVID and everything else. Facebook is trash. It's my opinion. I can't stand that platform. Now some people might like it; I don't. And I'm entitled to say that I don't like it. I don't like Facebook. I don't like TikTok. I don't like Instagram, but I use them because they are witnessing tools for the Lord. I personally don't like them. I don't mind X or Truth Social. You know, I believe Elon Musk can become radically born again. I have seen it. You say, "Well, Brandon, how?" I believe anybody can get saved. Whenever I saw the pricks on the hearts last night and Diana found the verse, I saw the hardest of hearts of people. I saw a man with a beard and tattoos all over his body, and he was so angry. His mother had been praying for him last night, and I saw this man that seemed like he was hellbound. Nobody's going to save this guy; he is hellbound. I saw a prick on his heart, and what was a black heart of stone, just like onyx black, got a little bit of life in it, and the life started to spread. You know how you are purple if you drowned or something, and all of a sudden they bring you back and all of a sudden that rigor mortis that's setting in and you get that blood flow and that purple starts to fade away? That's the way his heart looked. And the Lord said, "The hardest of hearts in the days ahead, I'll prick them with just love. It just takes one prick." And he used the scripture. It was Acts 2:37. Thank you, son. Good job, Braden. Acts 2:37. And He's coming after the hearts that are hardened towards Him. He's leaving the 99 to go after the one. And when we were praying into it, we even prayed for a young man whose name was Tyrone. Tyrone. We called forth Tyrone to come home. I saw an African-American woman, an old woman praying for Tyrone. She was an elderly woman in her rocking chair and she was interceding and weeping before the Lord for Tyrone. God's heard all of your prayers. He loves the souls just as much as you love your loved ones. He loves His kids and He wishes that none should perish but all come to repentance. Every single one of us. He loves even the darkest of the darkest sinner. And He doesn't want any of you to go to hell. Not one of them. And that's why I was trying to say so much last night. People try to misconstrue what I was saying. It's not going to validate the Bible, but it will shake the Muslims in the days ahead because of the artifacts that will be found out of the earth. The Word of God validates itself. It doesn't need any help. But there are some people that will not believe unless they see a sign. They're just that hard. And the Lord said, "I'm going to provide a sign for the unbelievers, Brandon." That's what He was saying. And He's going after the Muslims that are so strong in their faith because they're blinded. They're blinded by unbelief. They're blinded by false religion. They're blinded like some Buddhists. They don't see. And I saw going across Asia, the hardness of the hardest hearts in Asia that were so bound by being a Buddhist or Muslim or whatever, that the Lord said, "I'm going after the Asians." And I saw a wave of glory, a wave of the prick of His presence upon the hardest of hearts bringing them in. And I saw the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen. Will it be everybody? No, sadly. But He's leaving the 99 to go after the ones that we're praying for. So, I want to pray for the people tonight. I'm praying for a greatest harvest of souls in America and Europe and in Asia and in Australia, in South America, in Africa. Why not believe for, you know, I hear one preach a billion-soul harvest and all this stuff. Then I hear one guy who says we have 30 years left and all this other stuff. Listen, be careful who you're listening to. We don't know about 30 years. Jesus is coming. And He keeps talking about having an urgency. What's an urgency if it's 30 years? He's standing at the door. And He tells me, "Brandon, I'm standing at the door" to the ones that are truly hearing Him and that are not cold or trying to perform. If God's not speaking, just shut up. There's no reason to perform. We're not here to entertain you. I don't have to stay relevant. If the platform dies tomorrow, I'll go back to doing full-time eBay and Poshmark. I enjoyed it before. I do this because He asked me to. Tonight, I wasn't going to do a broadcast. He said, "Brandon, I need you to help me." I was cleaning the floors, and I told Braden, "We're not doing prayer tonight. I'm going to take a break." He said, "No, I need you to help me. You must pray for your president." So, I say all this in 30 minutes. I gave you a little something of where we are. We sure love you, all 7,700 of you. Thank you for being here tonight. We appreciate every single one of you. Almost 8,000 people here to pray, so let's pray. We'll take communion before; I always do. People ask, "Why do you do that?" Because I don't go before His throne without taking communion first. I don't want to be snared by any familiar spirits. I'm just as human as you are, and you've got to cover all your roads and all your bases because the enemy comes in like an angel of light and he'll snare you faster than you can think about it. It's obviously snaring a lot of prophetic voices. So you need to always take communion and go before His throne boldly, listening to Him by taking communion, prayer, and worship first. Don't just jump in a river thinking you can hear. The Lord said the gift is only pure whenever the glory is on you. I had this dream—I'll say this real quick—I was at a conference and I was getting ready to speak. The guest speaker walked up to me and the glory of the Lord came on him, and she said, "What do you see?" I felt the glory. She said, "Only speak and reveal what the Lord's showing you until the anointing is on you to do so." Every time I went to say something, I couldn't get the words out because the glory wasn't there. The power of God knocked me down; it was a whole thing of correction. But ever since then, I always wait. Even when it comes to any of my own personal stuff, even when I'm talking and listening to the Lord with Diana, I wait until the cloak comes on. Do not talk for the Father unless you feel the presence of the Lord like I do right now. Wait. Wait on Him. There's no hurry. If it doesn't show up, you shut up. You're not here to tickle people's ears and you're not here to perform. Just go on about your business, son. I can do nothing apart from Him. I have this treasure in earthen vessels, that the excellency of the power may be of Him and not of me. Regardless of 7,700 people, I want to get that across. Father, we just lift up this body. We thank You, Father, for what You're about to show us. You said, "I have things for you to do," and I'm so grateful that You asked me. I humble myself before You. What is it that You have need of, Father, that You would look at me? Father, we take this body in the name of Jesus and we thank You, Lord, that You died for every single one of us so that we don't have to go to hell. By Your stripes we were healed. You took it all on the cross for us. You took sickness and disease. You took mental torments, depression, SAD, seasonal affective disorder. You took anxiety and pressure. You had so much pressure on You that You sweat blood. Lord, I'm so grateful for what You did for us. We take this body in the name of Jesus and we believe we receive what You did for us by faith, that we're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. You dwell on the inside of us by faith and we receive it in Jesus' name. I'm a believing believer. Amen. Lord, we take the blood and we apply the blood of Jesus over our great nation. We thank You, Father, for our president. We thank You, Father, for his children and their children. We plead the blood over his wife and over Barron, over Tiffany, over Ivanka, over Eric and over Don. We cover every single one of the kids and Kai and the grandkids in the blood. We thank You, Lord, that no weapon formed against them will prosper. A thousand shall fall at their side and ten thousand at their right hand, but nothing shall come nigh. We pray over JD Vance and over his wife. We pray over their kids. We thank You, Lord, that the angels of the Lord are kept around about them. We thank You, Lord, for our law enforcement, our sheriff's department, our local police department, the FBI, and the highway patrol. Father, we cover every single one of them in the blood. Homeland Security, the NSA, the TSA—I thank You, Father, that we make much of the blood and the blood makes much of us. We pray over the churches. I pray over Lakewood Church; it comes before me again. I pray over Lakewood Church and all that area around there. I pray over Houston. I pray over Joel and Victoria. I plead the blood of Jesus over them. I thank You, Lord, that no weapon formed against them would prosper and every tongue that rises against them, Father, we condemn it now. Father, I thank You, Lord, that there's a shaking to awaken and the great glory of God would rest on them and bring them back to a stronger foundation and a stronger root in Jesus' name. We plead the blood over them. Lord, I take this blood right now in Jesus' name. I even see John Hagee right now. Why those churches, Lord? Cornerstone in San Antonio, Texas. It's a bloodline around that church because he's standing with Israel. It's an attack because of what he does with Israel. This is what I'm seeing right now; it's because of his stance toward Israel. He's very vocal about this. There are local groups—I see one particular person that is an ISIS supporter there in San Antonio. I'm seeing it very clearly; it's one individual for sure. He's a sympathizer. He looks like he's African-American mixed. He's lighter skinned, not full African-American. Everybody knows what I'm talking about. He's maybe 240 or 250 pounds. This is very serious. I see this man; he's a sympathizer. No, we call him down and we call him exposed. You'll not touch the Hagees. You'll not touch Cornerstone Church. We bind you in the name of Jesus Christ. We command you to cease and desist your maneuvering and we plead the blood of Jesus over Cornerstone Church and over the congregation. No weapon formed against them will prosper. We bind this demonic assignment. We command you to cease and desist now in Jesus' name. We call for an uncovering of every plot, every plan, and every pursuit on this congregation. We say you will not do this in Jesus' name. We thank You, Lord, that we'll see the news and he'll get born again and radically saved in Jesus' name. It's him and two others. Now, Sister Clipboard, don't be calling and bothering these people. We've got it. His people, I'm sure, watch. So don't be calling and blowing up his phone, okay? Don't be trying to harass these people. Don't be flaky. Pray. Use more time praying instead of being a busybody. Be more prayerful instead of careful. No, there'll be so much more in the days ahead that the Lord will reveal to you. You must get a backbone like a crowbar. We're in dark times. Stop being scattered like the sky is falling. The sky is not falling. That's why he's called us to watch on the wall, to take our authority over things, and to be able to use our faith, our God-given authority. Like Sister Sister Billie always tells us, 'The Authority of the Believer.' You must read books like this and fill your spirit full of good literature instead of the trash you're watching on The View or whatever. Stop watching that, Sister. Get in the Word daily.
